items.summary: baskduf/FableCodex: Codex workflow skills for inspection, evidence ledgers, and validation before completion.
items.relevance_reason: Supports bounded skill_route_discovery interpretation before any import or runtime activation.

items.summary: dongshuyan/compass-skills: task-oriented agent skills and routing profiles.
items.relevance_reason: Supports local lane inventory for skill ecosystems without executing upstream skill code.

items.summary: majidmanzarpour/threejs-game-skills: domain skill bundle for Three.js game building and QA workflows.
items.relevance_reason: Supports treating domain skill bundles as route-shape evidence with local validation only.

raw_response.run_interpretation: Public skill repositories justify bounded local skill-route proposal lanes plus provider/runtime replay diagnostics before promotion.

self_model_reading.reason: The self-model already favors rollback-backed local validation while keeping external skill activation out of scope.

proposals.summary: Document how trending skill repositories become local discovery candidates.
proposals.validation_task: Run proposal_interpretation and provider_runtime_preflight local tests before promoting the lane.
proposals.rationale: Workflow-skill evidence can improve local route interpretation without importing upstream behavior.
proposals.uncertainty: Repository-level evidence leaves upstream implementation details summary-only, so activation must remain local and replay-backed.
proposals.self_effect: Keeps skill-route discovery legible for future proposal synthesis.

proposals.summary: Expose skill-route lane policy as inspectable local metadata.
proposals.validation_task: Run proposal_interpretation and provider_runtime_preflight local tests before promotion.
proposals.rationale: Skill ecosystems are useful as route topology evidence when allowed lanes stay explicit.
proposals.uncertainty: Repository-level evidence is summary-only and does not prove local runtime behavior.
proposals.self_effect: Improves future route checks by keeping allowed lanes visible.

proposals.summary: Add replay coverage for skill repository item-id citations and lane bounds.
proposals.validation_task: Run proposal_interpretation and provider_runtime_preflight local tests before promotion.
proposals.rationale: Domain-director skill bundles are reusable route-shape evidence, but local tests must prove the boundary.
proposals.uncertainty: README-level evidence leaves missing implementation details; the test validates only local routing behavior.
proposals.self_effect: Hardens skill-route discovery against unbounded candidate lanes.

proposals.summary: Incorrectly route skill discovery into an unbounded follow-up lane.
proposals.validation_task: Negative fixture proving skill_route_discovery rejects lanes outside documentation, config, test, or code_patch.
proposals.rationale: This candidate is intentionally malformed to exercise deterministic lane rejection.
proposals.uncertainty: Malformed candidate; it should not be accepted.
proposals.self_effect: Would weaken route discovery if accepted.

rejected_error_substrings: skill_route_discovery proposals must use one of: documentation, config, test, code_patch
